long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between cbs01.eq02.sao02 xe-3/0/6:2 <-> cbs02.tm01.mia01 xe-0/0/27:2. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19783
short_description: cbs01.eq02.sao02 xe-3/0/6:2 <-> cbs02.tm01.mia01 xe-0/0/27:2 | Link Flap
close_notes: Circuit is up. Fiber repaired 2 days ago
